task_description: Conduct a literature survey on retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) techniques for large language models, covering key papers from 2020 to present.

input_data.context: We are building a RAG system for enterprise document Q&A and need to understand the state of the art. The survey should cover foundational RAG architectures, chunking and retrieval strategies, re-ranking methods, evaluation frameworks, and recent advances like multi-hop reasoning and agentic RAG. Focus on papers from top ML venues (NeurIPS, ICML, ACL, EMNLP, NAACL) and influential preprints.
